inputs.text: Meri tabiyat bahut kharab hai, bukhar bahut tezi se chadha hai, sir dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can also present with sudden onset of high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Dengue is a possibility, but other symptoms like retro-orbital pain are not yet present

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya can also cause joint pain, but retro-orbital pain is more specific to Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the specific symptoms of retro-orbital pain and bone pain

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash, bleeding gums, and drop in fever are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is unlikely given the specific symptoms of rash and bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is unlikely given the absence of specific symptoms like chills and rigors

inputs.text: Bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, haalat aur bhi bigad gaya hai
